prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次分别为约8522名→13087名→10642名→20793名→13697名，整体波动较大。2024年因广西首次实施新高考（物理类/历史类） 出现位次大幅后移至20793名，2025年迅速回升至13697名，近两年呈先降后升走势，2025年基准约13697名；该校在广西物理类招生计划2021–2023年分别为22人 、22人、23人，2024年降至17人，2025年回升至19人；2026年计划进一步缩至14人，较2025年减少约26.3%，缩招幅度较大，理论上降低录取门槛。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南京 师范大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第58名，近年排名稳定在47–61名区间，属中上层次211；2026年高考周期内声誉评价为"明显 负面"，主要涉及师德师风事件（副院长婚内出轨被免职、误挂旭日旗等），可能对部分考生报考心理产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第69位，评价"一般"，短视频曝光量中等。未 见明显投档断档历史记录；第五轮学科评估中，教育学A、马克思主义理论A、地理学A、中国语言文学A-、外国语言文学A-，师范类学科实力突出，但物理类招 生专业（自动化、能源动力类、生物科学类等）与上述优势学科直接关联较弱。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 物理类相关专业中，电气/自动化、电子信息/通信、计算机类社会热度为 高热推荐或推荐，能源动力类为推荐，师范/教育类为分化观望；广西2026年普通高考总人数约39.2万，较2025年（约38万）增加约3.2%，按近年比例估算物理类考生约26.9万， 较2025年（26万）增加约3.3%，竞争略有加剧；南京师范大学位于江苏 省南京市，属长三角发达地区，对广西考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在广西物理类招生规模较小（14–22人），属跨省招生，本地无特殊倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准 位次13697名、2026年计划大幅缩招26.3%（降低门槛）、广西物理类考生增加约3.3%（加剧竞争）、声誉负面（可能抑制热度）等多重因素，再结合 考生规模增加及声誉负面做有限修正。预计2026年最低位次约11564名，区间11064–12064名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 8522 → 13087 → 10642 → 20793 → 13697, showing significant fluctuations. In 2024, due to Guangxi's first implementation of the new college entrance exam (Physics Category/Humanities Category), the ranking dropped sharply to 20793, then rebounded to 13697 in 2025, showing a decline followed by an increase in the last two years, with a baseline of about 13697 in 2025. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangxi was 22, 22, and 23 from 2021 to 2023, dropped to 17 in 2024, and rebounded to 19 in 2025. The 2026 plan further shrinks to 14, a decrease of about 26.3% from 2025, a significant reduction that theoretically lowers the admission threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranks approximately 58th, with stable rankings in the 47–61 range in recent years, placing it in the mid-to-upper tier of 211 universities. During the 2026 college entrance exam cycle, its reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative,' mainly due to teacher ethics incidents (a vice dean was dismissed for extramarital affairs, mistakenly hanging the Rising Sun flag, etc.), which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranks 69th, with a 'fair' evaluation and moderate short video exposure. No obvious historical records of enrollment gaps have been observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, Education, Marxist Theory, and Geography received A grades; Chinese Language and Literature and Foreign Languages and Literature received A- grades. The strength in teacher-training disciplines is prominent, but the majors recruited under Physics Category (Automation, Energy and Power, Biological Sciences, etc.) have weak direct connections to these advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among Physics Category-related majors, Electrical/Automation, Electronic Information/Communication, and Computer Science have high social popularity or are recommended; Energy and Power is recommended; Teacher Training/Education is divided and watched. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the regular college entrance exam in Guangxi is about 392,000, an increase of about 3.2% from 2025 (about 380,000). Based on recent proportions, Physics Category candidates are estimated at about 269,000, an increase of about 3.3% from 2025 (260,000), slightly intensifying competition. Nanjing Normal University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, in the developed Yangtze River Delta region, which has some regional appeal for Guangxi candidates. Its enrollment scale for Physics Category in Guangxi is small (14–22 people), making it a cross-provincial enrollment with no special local preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 13697, the significant 26.3% enrollment reduction in 2026 (lowering the threshold), the approximately 3.3% increase in Guangxi Physics Category candidates (intensifying competition), and the negative reputation (possibly suppressing popularity), along with limited adjustments for the increase in candidate numbers and negative reputation, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 11564, with a range of 11064–12064.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 11564, with a range of 11064–12064. Candidates within this range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors (Chemistry, Energy and Power) as main choices, with Tier 1 majors (Automation, Applied Psychology) as reach targets. Candidates significantly above the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 11000) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors. Candidates near the upper limit of the range (around 12000) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety options.

In 2024, due to Guangxi's first implementation of the new college entrance exam, the ranking dropped sharply to 3770, but rebounded to 1354 in 2025, showing a decline followed by an increase in recent two years, with a baseline of about 1354 in 2025. The enrollment plan for History Category in Guangxi was 15, 15, 14 from 2021 to 2023, dropped to 10 in 2024–2025, and is projected to sharply decrease to 2 in 2026, an 80% reduction compared to 2025, which theoretically significantly lowers the admission threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing Normal University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks approximately 58th, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. During the 2026 college entrance exam cycle, its reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative', mainly involving teacher ethics incidents, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. 预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 1354, the 80% reduction in 2026 enrollment plan (significantly lowering the threshold), the 3.3% increase in Guangxi History Category candidates (intensifying competition), negative reputation (possibly suppressing popularity), and the high match between advantageous disciplines and enrollment majors (enhancing appeal), with limited adjustments for increased candidate numbers and negative reputation, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 719, with a range of 590–848.
